title: athyrium subrigescens
intro: Athyrium subrigescens, also known as the Lady Fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Athyrium genus. The medicinal properties of Athyrium subrigescens include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, making it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and improve overall liver function. Athyrium subrigescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat a range of health issues.
